events.text: Marko Pjaca (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Iceland 0, Croatia 1. Milan Badelj (Croatia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner.
Emil Hallfredsson (Iceland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Alfred Finnbogason (Iceland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Iceland 1, Croatia 1. Gylfi Sigurdsson (Iceland) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the high centre of the goal.
Tin Jedvaj (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Birkir Sævarsson (Iceland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Iceland 1, Croatia 2. Ivan Perisic (Croatia) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Milan Badelj.
